data.jsCode: function txt(){if(message&&message.contact&&message.contact.phone_number){return String(message.contact.phone_number)}if(message&&message.text){return String(message.text).trim()}return ""}function ask(t){send_message({text:t,parse_mode:"HTML"})}function clean(){delete_context("_event_reg_step")}function norm(s,v){if(s.phone){var c=v.replace(/[^\d+]/g,"");return c[0]==="+"?c:"+"+c}return v}function valid(s,v){if(s.phone){return /^\+?\d{9,15}$/.test(v)}return v.length>=(s.min||1)}var steps=[{key:"event_reg_name",prompt:get_context("param_name_prompt")||"Tadbir uchun ism va familiyangizni yozing:",error:"Kamida 3 ta belgi kiriting.",min:3},{key:"event_reg_phone",prompt:get_context("param_phone_prompt")||"Telefon raqamingizni yuboring:",error:"Telefonni +998901234567 formatida yuboring.",phone:true},{key:"event_reg_guests",prompt:get_context("param_guests_prompt")||"Necha kishi bilan kelasiz? Masalan: 1, 2, 3",error:"Son yoki qisqa javob kiriting.",min:1},{key:"event_reg_note",prompt:get_context("param_note_prompt")||"Qo'shimcha talab bo'lsa yozing. Bo'lmasa '-' yuboring:",error:"Javobni qayta yuboring.",min:1}];var step=parseInt(get_context("_event_reg_step")||"0",10);var answer=txt();if(answer.toLowerCase()==="/cancel"){clean();exit("cancelled")}if(step>0){var prev=steps[step-1];var value=norm(prev,answer);if(prev.key==="event_reg_note"&&value==="-"){value=""}if(!valid(prev,value)){ask(prev.error+" Bekor qilish uchun /cancel yuboring.");wait_for_input()}set_context(prev.key,value)}if(step>=steps.length){send_message({text:get_context("param_success_message")||("Tadbir ro'yxatdan o'tishi qabul qilindi. 👤 "+(get_context("event_reg_name")||"")+" 📞 "+(get_context("event_reg_phone")||"")+" 👥 "+(get_context("event_reg_guests")||"")+" 📝 "+(get_context("event_reg_note")||"-")),parse_mode:"HTML"});clean();exit("completed")}ask(steps[step].prompt+" Bekor qilish uchun /cancel yuboring.");set_context("_event_reg_step",String(step+1));wait_for_input();
